prose: Troglitazone is correctly returned as a negative under an adversarial-negative tier because the evidence-ranked mechanistic hypothesis rests on curated mechanism alone, and that strand is empty: no CTD curated DirectEvidence for Parkinson's and no registration as a neuro-AOP stressor [E1]. The compound is genuinely bioactive, with 19 mechanistic assay hits including 5 mitochondrial signals [E2], and this is precisely the imposter pattern the engine is built to resist — assay bioactivity is corroborative and anti-diagnostic, never decisive, so it cannot manufacture a curated link that does not exist. Pharmacovigilance offers no assessable FAERS reports to weigh either way [E3]. Reinforcing this orthogonally, structure-based prediction indicates low brain exposure (BBB-negative), a pharmacokinetic reason it is implausible as a CNS driver [E4]. Taken together, the strands support the fixed negative call: mitochondrial activity in vitro does not, absent curated mechanism, imply a neurodegenerative role.

citations.detail: No curated Parkinson's DirectEvidence and not a registered neuro-AOP stressor.
citations.reference: Davis AP, Wiegers TC, Johnson RJ, et al. Comparative Toxicogenomics Database (CTD): update 2023. Nucleic Acids Research. 2023;51(D1):D1257-D1262. Mechanistic scaffold: OECD Adverse Outcome Pathway Wiki. AOP 3: Inhibition of the mitochondrial complex I of nigro-striatal neurons leads to parkinsonian motor deficits (WPHA/WNT Endorsed).

citations.detail: Bioactive: 19 mechanistic assay hits (incl. 5 mitochondrial). This is the imposter signal the engine correctly does NOT act on.
citations.reference: U.S. EPA ToxCast/Tox21 invitroDB (v4.2), accessed through the NICEATM Integrated Chemical Environment (ICE). Active hitcalls only; queried on the salt-form-correct record.
U.S. FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS), via the openFDA drug/event API. Disproportionality (ROR) for the parkinsonism MedDRA cluster.

citations.detail: Low brain exposure (BBB-negative): an orthogonal pharmacokinetic reason it cannot be a driver.
citations.reference: Meng F, Xi Y, Huang J, Ayers PW. A curated diverse molecular database of blood-brain barrier permeability with chemical descriptors (B3DB). Scientific Data. 2021;8:289. Daina A, Zoete V. A BOILED-Egg to predict gastrointestinal absorption and brain access of small molecules. ChemMedChem. 2016;11(11):1117-1121.
